headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 16, 2026**
article:
The Philadelphia Phillies secured a thrilling 11-9 win over the Pittsburgh Pirates, led by Kyle Schwarber's dominant performance. The Washington Nationals edged out the Baltimore Orioles 3-2, with Zack Littell pitching 5.0 innings and allowing 0 earned runs. The Detroit Tigers fell to the Toronto Blue Jays 2-1, despite Andrés Giménez's strong performance.

Several key players have been placed on the injured list, including Trevor Story of the Boston Red Sox, who is dealing with a sports hernia. Other players affected by injuries include Clay Holmes of the New York Mets, Max Fried of the New York Yankees, Matt Strahm of the Kansas City Royals, Matt Waldron of the San Diego Padres, Blake Snell of the Los Angeles Dodgers, Chase Dollander of the Colorado Rockies, and Cal Raleigh of the Seattle Mariners.

The Chicago White Sox acquired Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-hander Jackson Nove. The Pittsburgh Pirates received Kyle Robinson from the Athletics in exchange for second baseman Alika Williams. The Athletics also traded right-hander Eduarniel Núñez to the Baltimore Orioles for cash, and the Seattle Mariners traded left-hander José Suarez to the Athletics for cash.

top_news.title: **Phillies Take Thrilling 11-9 Win Over Pirates**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies outlasted the Pittsburgh Pirates in a high-scoring matchup, securing an 11-9 victory. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with a dominant performance, collecting 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Down Orioles in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals edged out the Baltimore Orioles 3-2, securing a crucial win. Zack Littell led the Nationals to victory, pitching 5.0 innings with 3 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Blue Jays in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers edged out the Toronto Blue Jays 3-2 in a closely contested game. Andrés Giménez led the Blue Jays' offense with 1 hit and 2 RBI, while Trey Yesavage pitched 6 strong innings for the Blue Jays, striking out 6 and allowing 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Reds Edge Guardians in Thrilling 7-6 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds secured a hard-fought win over the Cleveland Guardians, outlasting their opponents by a single run. Matt McLain led the Reds' offense with a strong performance, collecting 2 hits, including a home run, and driving in 3 runs.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Edge Tigers in Thrilling 2-1 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays secured a narrow win over the Detroit Tigers, finalizing the score at 2-1. Impact players on the Blue Jays included Yohendrick Piñango, Daulton Varsho, Kevin McGonigle, and Matt Vierling.

top_news.title: **Story Placed on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Boston Red Sox shortstop Trevor Story has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a sports hernia, effective retroactive to May 15, 2026.

top_news.title: **White Sox Acquire Junior Perez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Chicago White Sox have acquired center fielder Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-handed pitcher Jackson Nove. This move adds depth to the White Sox outfield.
